name: PriceOps
description: PriceOps is a pricing and packaging infrastructure platform for SaaS companies that enables simulation of pricing strategies, design of packaging tiers, and launch of pricing pages within minutes.

potentialAction.name: Get Customers
potentialAction.description: Retrieve all subscribed customers and their active plans for an organization

potentialAction.name: Post Usage Records
potentialAction.description: Submit metered usage records for a customer within an organization

subjectOf.headline: Maximizing Business Growth Through Intentional Churn and Price Increase
subjectOf.description: Distinguishes between unintentional and intentional churn from price increases, advocating for viewing selective churn positively when companies communicate changes clearly and demonstrate increased value delivery.

subjectOf.headline: State of Shrinkflation 2024 and beyond
subjectOf.description: Examines the shrinkflation trend and growing retailer resistance, recommending alternative strategies such as product segmentation, operational cost cutting, and direct-to-consumer channels.

subjectOf.headline: Difference between Billing and Pricing infrastructure
subjectOf.description: Clarifies the distinction between billing systems (subscription management, invoicing, tax compliance) and pricing infrastructure (strategy and optimization), emphasizing they serve different purposes in the order-to-cash process.
